q: Sometimes you have to make decisions that break your heart but bring peace to your soul.
The purpose of climbing the mountain of success is not for the world to see you, but for you to see the world.
People always say we only live once, but in reality we live everyday and only die once.
If you are not cringe enough, you are not living enough!
If you're trying to love yourself, you already do. Where do you think the trying comes from?
The day you start trying is the day you stop being a loser.
It's okay to embarass yourself a little in the pursuit of human connection.
